productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Theodore White Sports Shoes
description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these navy and red Theodore trainers from adidas. With its lightweight features, your running is guaranteed to be fast and comfortable. Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathability Cushioned tongue and collar for extra comfort Mesh tongue for greater breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Three synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievement Outsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefoot Brand name embroidered on the tongue and behind collar Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort LiteStrike technology on the midsole heel for better cushioning of the heel Full length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole Blown rubber outsole for lightweight motion control Outsole with Traxion lugs on the forefoot for better grip and traction Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet Toe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefoot Scooped out heel for better cushioning against shock in the heel Impact guidance system for better natural motion of the feet Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
